title: Surgical dressing
abstract: Surgical Dressing The present invention provides a surgical dressing (1) for positioning about a drain (4). The surgical dressing (1) has an inner side and an outer side (2) and a central aperture (3) through which a drain (4) may be positioned. The dressing (1) may further comprise a first suture (12) extending outwardly from the outer side (2) of the dressing (1), attached to the dressing at an inner end, and having a free outer end; and a second suture (13) extending outwardly from the outer side (2) of the dressing (1), attached to the dressing at an inner end and having a free outer end. The dressing (1) may further comprise a first aperture (9) adjacent a first edge (10) of the dressing (1) for passing a suture through; and a second aperture (11) adjacent a second edge (22) of the dressing (1) for passing a suture through; wherein, the first edge (10) of the dressing is on an opposing side of the dressing to the second edge (22).
claims: Claims Claims 1. A surgical dressing having an inner side and an outer side and a central aperture through which a drain may be positioned, wherein the surgical dressing further comprises: a first suture extending outwardly from the outer side of the dressing, attached to the dressing at an inner end, and having a free outer end; and a second suture extending outwardly from the outer side of the dressing, attached to the dressing at an inner end and having a free outer end. 2. A surgical dressing according to claim 1, wherein the first suture is the same length as the second suture. 3. A surgical dressing according to claim 1 or claim 2, wherein the inner end of the first suture and the inner end of the second suture are equidistant from the central aperture. 4. A surgical dressing according to claim 1, further comprising: a third suture extending outwardly from the outer side of the dressing, attached to the dressing at an inner end, and having a free outer end; and a fourth suture extending outwardly from the outer side of the dressing, attached to the dressing at an inner end and having a free outer end. 5. A surgical dressing according to claim 4, wherein the third suture is the same length as the fourth suture. 6. A surgical dressing according to claim 4 or claim 5, wherein the inner end of the third suture and the inner end of the fourth suture are equidistant from the central aperture. 7. A surgical dressing according to any preceding claim wherein the surgical dressing also has: a first aperture adjacent a first edge of the dressing for passing a suture through; and a second aperture adjacent a second edge of the dressing for passing a suture through; wherein, the first edge of the dressing is on an opposing side of the dressing to the second edge. 8. A surgical dressing according to any preceding claim, wherein an absorbent pad is provided on the inner side of the dressing about the central aperture. 9. A surgical dressing according to any preceding claim, wherein the inner side of the dressing is self-adhesive. 10. A surgical dressing according to any preceding claim, wherein the self-adhesive comprises an anti-microbial silicon adhesive. 11. A surgical dressing according to claim 9 or claim 10, wherein a peelable protective layer is provided over the self-adhesive inner side of the dressing. 12. A surgical dressing according to any preceding claim further comprising an information label on the outer side. 13. A surgical dressing according to any preceding claim, wherein a slit is formed through the dressing from an edge of the dressing to the central aperture. 14. A surgical dressing according to any preceding claim, wherein a central portion of the dressing about the aperture is transparent.
